column2:
1. For easier understanding, the table uses simulated data of 100, 1000 yuan, etc. You will find many unreasonable prices, but that's okay because it's just a template. Everyone can fill in according to their own actual situation.  
2. You can add or remove specific renovation items. However, it is best to only modify the parts with black text on white background, and do not arbitrarily change the gray parts, as changing them will make the calculation formulas ineffective (this means that the discounted price, subtotal, and total are automatically calculated).
